purpose: Explicit public-launch manifest for root HTML pages built by Vite. A root *.html file ships only after it is listed here with publicLaunchIntent.

pages.publicLaunchIntent: Primary Sundog public website entry point.
Public lab positioning, philosophy, origin bridge, and claim boundaries.
Public alignment and Bayes comparator primer defining route fidelity, same-information baselines, and current claim-hygiene ledger.
Public gallery of application surfaces and evidence tiers.
Public Balance workbench interface.
Public Ask Sundog claim-boundary experiment page.
Public h-of-x math workbench: plain first-equation demo for the promoted parhelion-offset inverse and its eligibility boundary.
Public geometry workbench shelf: cap-set primer, halo/h-of-x routing, and bounded apparatus framing for discrete-geometry discoveries.
Public vocabulary legend/reference page for halo terms and site terms; distinct from the visual Halo Atlas.
Public Mesa operating-envelope and traceability page.
Public Pressure Mines workbench interface.
Public origin and provenance story.
Public human and agent navigation map for evidence pages, docs, workbenches, and source context.
Public paper-theme design primitive demo linked from docs.

Legacy public alias that redirects /atlas or /atlas.html to the canonical visual Halo Atlas at /sundog.
Canonical public Sundog geometry and visual Halo Atlas page; distinct from the vocabulary Legend.
Public Sundog workbench interface.
Public Three-Body workbench interface.
Public cap-set workbench: interactive F_3^n exploration framing the 2016 polynomial-method breakthrough as a precedent for the 2026 unit-distance disproof.
Public unit-distance overlay: plain-English read of OpenAI's 2026 disproof, from cyclic cubic field through unramified pro-3 tower to CM lattice projecting to many unit-distance pairs.

Public Isotrophy audit-chain page: preserves the K_facet v0.3h pillar (20 structural-zero receipts plus one O_617 quarantine) and stages the v0.3-v0.9 program pause, including the restricted-domain v0.7 Floquet velocity-fraction positive on 250 analyzable supplementary-B rows.

SKETCH — method-essay bridge between the Shadow Faraday Branch A receipt and three load-bearing translations to AI behavioral guarantees (local gauge-invariant readout, structural zero, named quarantine). Class B candidate in the SEO matrix: local Bucket 1 artifacts are now present, including bespoke 1200x630 og:image at public/og/safety-method.png, full OG/Twitter/JSON-LD metadata, sitemap entry, clean-url redirect, and inbound thread from index.html through /faraday to /safety-method.html. Post-deploy validator pass and the staged compander citation ratchet remain owed before /safety-method is externally pushed. The page is indexable (no noindex) but flagged in-product as SKETCH so claim hygiene is preserved while the translation is evaluated. Anchored to docs/SHADOW_FARADAY.md#phase-5-chapter-close as the worked example; explicitly not a proof of AI safety, not a theory of interpretability, and not a recipe.

Public Shadow Faraday Zero-Out evidence page. Experiment chapter is closed: Phases 1-5 receipts cross-linked at docs/SHADOW_FARADAY.md (with Branch A Phase 3 in docs/FARADAY_PHASE3_DERIVATIONS.md, 5/5 Phase 4 battery in docs/FARADAY_PHASE4_VERIFICATION.md via npm run faraday:phase4, and Phase 5 chapter close at docs/SHADOW_FARADAY.md#phase-5-chapter-close with receipts catalog, scope limitations, extension menu, and fidelity audit). Bucket 1 local artifacts are present: designed 1200x630 og:image at public/og/faraday.png, full OG/Twitter metadata, JSON-LD TechArticle, sitemap entry, clean-url redirect, index.html internal link, and onward bridge to /safety-method.
